title: Section 2
content: The provisions of this Act shall be in addition to, and not, save as hereinafter expressly provided, in derogation of the 1[Companies Act, 1956 (1 of 1956)], any other law for the time being in force.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 95 of 1956, s. 14 and the Schedule, for "Indian Companies Act, 1913 (7 of 1913)" (w.e.f. 14-1-1957).
